projects.title: Opencode Dashboard
projects.description: A client-side dashboard for visualizing your opencode usage data — sessions, messages, tokens, costs, providers, models, agents, and skills. All data is local. No backend server. No cloud upload.

projects.title: DevKit Agent
projects.description: Multi-agent coding pipeline for OpenCode. Install agents and skills with one command. Routes complex tasks through specialist agents — Analyst, Planner, Programmer, Reviewer — with approval checkpoints at each stage.

projects.title: QR Windows Scanner
projects.description: A QR code scanner package for Windows Flutter apps. Uses the front camera and zxing2 to detect QR codes via periodic camera snapshots, working around the lack of image streaming support in camera_windows.
